headline: Can Axon’s New AI Suite Reframe Its Real-Time Data Advantage Story for Investors (AXON)?
summary: At its Axon Week 2026 conference held earlier this week, Axon Enterprise unveiled new AI-powered tools, Axon Vision, an expanded Axon Assistant, and Axon 911, aimed at giving public safety agencies faster, more integrated real-time intelligence across live video, mobile, and emergency call workflows. By stitching together live camera feeds, 911 data, and field reporting into a single AI-enabled platform, Axon is attempting to tackle the growing “data tax” facing first responders as they...

headline: Nasdaq tech leads strong Wall Street rebound after Iran ceasefire deal
summary: 9.55am: Rocket open Wall Street stocks have opened firmly higher, led by the Nasdaq, gaining 2.9% and the small cap Russell 2000, with a 3.45% jump. The blue chip Dow Jones started up 2.8%, while the S&P 500 rose 2.3%. Gains on the Nasdaq 100 were driven by semiconductor and tech...

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Surges 1,300 Points, Oil Prices Crash On U.S.-Iran Ceasefire (Live Coverage)
summary: Futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes soared ahead of Wednesday's trading session after President Donald Trump suspended Iran attacks for two weeks while Tehran agreed to open the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Rally On Easing Yields And CPI Focus
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Apr, 8 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts up about 2.6% and Nasdaq-100 futures ahead roughly 3.4%, as investors respond to easing geopolitical stress and a pullback in bond yields. The US 10 year Treasury yield has slipped toward a three week low after a two week ceasefire window between the US and Iran, which reduces worries about a wider conflict and helps interest rate sensitive areas...
